segment_plan.opening_0_3s: video_1 原始输入 + 大字“AI 给 KPI 没用”
segment_plan.bridge_3_8s: 继续保留屏录，字幕解释 KPI 看着完整但不能决策
segment_plan.problem_expand_8_15s: 改标题/开头/中段结构的问题抛出
segment_plan.evidence_middle: video_1 first prompt not enough -> second prompt; video_2 metric layer + lead score
segment_plan.ending_handoff: 四句 judgment card + ChatGPT / 用户复审

assembly_decision_pack.carrier_reason: 用户录制素材承担过程和结果证据，卡片只做压缩与收束。

degradation_plan.if_table_unreadable: replace long table with summary card + contact sheet reference
degradation_plan.if_preview_video_too_large_for_git: commit manifest and local path only
